authoritative_repository.sjas_frontier_summary: Implements SJAS/Proflog ADR-0063 through ADR-0068 and later Willard SJAS work: tableau-proof/3, subst-prf/4, subst-code/2, SelfCons checks, structural decoding—see worked-examples/willard-sjas.md and claims/proflog_sjas_witness.json.
authoritative_repository.decision_rationale: The former fork blockers on a missing ADR-006x frontier referred only to jpt4/proflog main. autarkenterprises/proflog at the pinned commit satisfies that frontier; AS records the pin in sources/proflog_pin.json and validates integration via autarkic_systems.proflog_integration. UC transition proofs remain AS-local predicate-result certificates per ADR-0010.
next_actions: Run extended suite lein test-proflog-sjas when validating full SelfCons regression.
Set AS_PROFLOG_ROOT to a clone at pinned_commit for live fast-suite checks.

legacy_public_stub.decision_rationale: Legacy stub only. Missing ADR-006x here does not block AS; use authoritative_repository.
